data.name: Angel's Awakening
data.detailed_description:
Angel's Awakening is an Interactive Erotic Story about the Sexual Awakening of a shy, reserved young librarian in the 1940s. Follow Angel and Detective Malone in their classic NOIR tale, as they search for Angel’s missing best friend. To find Angel’s friend, she must go places she would not normally go, and do naughty things she would not ordinarily do. To her surprise, she finds pure joy and happiness in letting go of her strict morals and participating in increasingly intense sexual activities.



Angel’s Awakening takes Erotic Interactive Fiction to the next level with true, full-Realtime 3D graphics and complete, top-quality voice acting throughout. You control the visual style, set the scene, and control the action during 16 increasingly intense sexual activities.

This Erotic NOIR story features mobsters, voyeurs, and even a secret society of the rich and powerful, whose primary activities are decadent orgies. Follow Angel’s story as she progresses from a hesitant but willing participant in an “Oral” experience with a mobster in an underground casino, to an incredible Five-On-One sexual encounter in front of an entire group of spectators at a decadent Orgy Festival.

Sexual interactions in Angel’s Awaking require you to manage Angel’s emotions, allowing her to ease into each situation, and overcome her nerves, before giving herself over to the excitement and joy and pleasure that she is feeling. If you manage the scenes properly, Angel will experience peaks of pleasure like nothing she ever knew was possible.

This Amazing Interactive Erotic Adventure features:
  • An intriguing, linear erotic story that will keep you engaged and turned-on, as Angel experiences an amazing sexual awakening right before your eyes.
  • Full English voice-over by a number of talented professional Erotic Voice Actresses and Actors, including hours of voice content by the amazingly talented and Insanely-Sexy Mia Sloane as Angel.
  • Visual style modifications that allow you to control the NOIR feel of the game, from full grainy black-and-white visuals to bright vibrant color.
  • The ability to play through and re-live every erotic scene over and over from a “scenes” menu.

data.short_description: Angel's Awakening is an Interactive Erotic Story about the amazing SEXUAL AWAKENING of a shy, reserved young librarian in the 1940s. In classic NOIR style, follow Angel's journey as she transforms from a repressed young woman into an uninhibited, lustful goddess with an insatiable appetite for SEX.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 4590 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 4GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 19 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 4500 or better
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 6GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
